steps.title: Connect claim and details
steps.content: The previous sentence claims community science can be effective and engaging. The underlined sentence explains that claim by listing benefits: more data, insight into scientists' daily work, and increased youth interest.

steps.title: Test the sentence function
steps.content: B says the sentence limits the following study, but it does not set a limit. C says it contrasts with the previous sentence, though it supports it. D says it identifies the Holloway study's purpose, but it gives general benefits of community science. The answer is A.
